summary: Classified the five open PRs in this live inventory shard independently. No shared canonical exists, no security-sensitive refs were detected, and the job disables low-signal closeout, instant close, merge, fix, and PR creation. Each PR should remain open with its current evidence or review blockers preserved for maintainer/author follow-up.

actions.reason: Independent open PR with unresolved proof/check blockers; not safely closable in this job.
Draft independent PR with unresolved real-behavior proof; keep open for author/maintainer follow-up.
Maintainer-owned independent PR with proof, but unresolved review findings and no merge authority in this job.
Independent open feature/bug-fix PR with unresolved review/proof blockers and active author-follow-up state.
Independent open docs/scripts PR with passing proof but unresolved requested changes and author-follow-up state.
